## Checklist

- [ ] Tested the Lua script in OBS or reviewed script behavior.
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed.
- [ ] Updated presets/schema if config behavior changed.
- [ ] Avoided committing copyrighted sound files.
- [ ] Preset changes do not silently overwrite user settings.
